title: Aegis Template Slot Manifest
description: Sibling <name>.template.json next to every template file under templates/{html,markdown,json}/. One shared schema across families; the `family` discriminator and `slots[].type` express family differences.

name.description: Template name. Matches the sibling template file basename (minus extension).

family.description: Output family. HTML: <!-- SLOT: key --> annotations. Markdown: {{ slot.key }} mustache-lite. JSON: __SLOT__key placeholder strings.

version.description: Semver. Major = breaking slot change; minor = additive optional slot; patch = wording. First stable ships at 0.1.0; 1.0.0 reserved for the v0.1.0 HTML-coverage milestone.

slots.description: Every slot the template exposes. May be empty for a static skeleton.

key.description: Slot identifier as it appears in the template (e.g. 'title', 'pr.number', 'findings[]').

type.description: Slot value type: a primitive (string|number|boolean), array, object, or a named shape defined in `shape`.

required.description: Whether the rendering agent must supply this slot. Default true.

enum.description: Closed value set for the slot (e.g. severity: [high, medium, low]).

shape.description: Optional named object/array shape definitions referenced by slots[].type. Each value documents the fields of a complex slot (e.g. findings[]{severity,file,line,description}).
